name: agni-code
description: Curated Codex workflows — focused skills and MCP configs for TDD, security scanning, code review, and network workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Curated skills and MCP configs for TDD, security, code review, and network workflows.
interface.longDescription: agni-code is a curated Claude Code plugin with focused agents, skills, commands, and rules for production-ready development workflows covering TDD, security scanning, code review, Python, C++, and network engineering.
defaultPrompt: Use the tdd-workflow skill to write tests before implementation.
Use the security-review skill to scan for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
Use the search-first skill to research before coding.
